zh.lifeSummary: 當WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO於大約1033年出生在義大利時，他的父親Otto II Marquis of Montferrat19歲，母親Constance of Savoy21歲。他於大約1075年與Emma d'Hauteville在義大利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1100年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO于大约1033年出生在意大利时，他的父亲Otto II Marquis of Montferrat19岁，母亲Constance of Savoy21岁。他于大约1075年与Emma d'Hauteville在意大利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1100年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: DEL
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lorraine): variant of the habitational name Delle 2 or a masculine form of a homonymous topographic name. — Note: In the population figure published by the US Census Bureau, the Spanish or Italian preposition with fused definite article del ‘of the’, which forms first part of surnames such as Del Cid and Del Signore , has apparently been in some instances counted as an independent surname.

variants.name: Delle
meanings: German: habitational name from a place so named in North Rhine-Westphalia or a topographic name (see   Dell  ).

French (Lorraine): habitational name from Delle, a place in Territoire de Belfort. Alternatively, a topographic name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone who lived near a prominent alder tree or trees, from elle, a derivative of Middle High German erle ‘alder’.

nameMeanings.name: WILLIAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO was born about 1033, in Italy, his father, Otto II Marquis of Montferrat, was 19 and his mother, Constance of Savoy, was 21. He married Emma d'Hauteville about 1075, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1100, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO est né environ 1033, à Italie, son père, Otto II Marquis of Montferrat, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Constance of Savoy, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Emma d'Hauteville environ 1075, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1100, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO um 1033 in Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Otto II Marquis of Montferrat 19 und seine Mutter Constance of Savoy 21. Er hat um 1075 in Italien Emma d'Hauteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1100 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO è nato il circa 1033 nel Italia, il suo padre, Otto II Marquis of Montferrat, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Constance of Savoy, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Emma d'Hauteville circa 1075, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1100, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATOが約1033年にイタリアで生まれた時，父Otto II Marquis of Montferratは19歳，母Constance of Savoyは21歳であった。約1075年にイタリアでEmma d'Hautevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1100年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO(이)가 대략 1033년 이탈리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Otto II Marquis of Montferrat(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance of Savoy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1075년 이탈리아에서 Emma d'Hauteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1100년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1033–about 1100: tany ho any amin'ny 1033–tany ho any amin'ny 1100

pt.lifeSummary: Quando WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO nasceu aproximadamente 1033, em Itália, seu pai, Otto II Marquis of Montferrat, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Constance of Savoy, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma d'Hauteville aproximadamente 1075, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1100, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO родился около 1033 г. в местности Италия, его отцу по имени Otto II Marquis of Montferrat было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance of Savoy, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma d'Hauteville около 1075 г. в местности Италия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1100 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando WILLIAM IV DEL MONFERRATO nació aproximadamente 1033, en Italia, su papá, Otto II Marquis of Montferrat, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Constance of Savoy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Emma d'Hauteville aproximadamente 1075, en Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1100, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
